title: run `varlink_generate` on Linux only
body:
Running the `varlink_generate` make target on non-Linux machines is not
supported, so restrict it to Linux only.

Fixes: #4814
Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <rothberg@redhat.com>

comments.body:
@baude @ssbarnea PTAL.

Note that I do not have any non-Linux machines. It would be good to have someone check if this PR fixes #4814 or if we're stuck on a subsequent stage.
